violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Boxes of chicken were being stored on the floor in the walk-in cooler.
Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Carboard lining shelves in the kitchen and duct tape on the flattop is not a cleanable surface.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Underneath the cutting board on the prep cooler in the kitchen needs to be cleaned.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not kept clean or maintained. The hand sink in the kitchen was not working properly at the time of inspection.

Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Observed handle of scoop in dry beans. -Observed open bags of food in upright freezer.--Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. -Observed boxes of food on floor of walk in cooler.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Observed wet wiping cloth on food prep surface rather than in sanitizing solution.

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. -Observed walk in cooler was not keeping food at 41F or below.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Observed bare wood 2x4's along kitchen ceiling. Bare wood is not a cleanable surface. it will need to be sealed or painted.
Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Food contact surface of clean in place equipment was not cleaned properly. -Observed dried food in microwave. It needs to be cleaned.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Observed vent hood has heavy grease buildup especially over griddle area.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was reused or used more than one time. -Observed single use cup being used to dip salsa into bowls.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. -Observed ice dumped in hand sink. It should be used for hand washing only.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Observed grease on wall and floor by fryer.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
